open-sourced html-anything 🚀

turns any data your agent has into world-class HTML, the way Claude Code's author has been hyping 🔥

3 days. 15k lines. 75 skills. 9 export formats. plugs into claude code, codex, openclaw, hermes, and pretty much any code agent 💥

RT @ai_xander_z: 把任意数据结构 → 自动转成高质量 HTML 展示

其实很适合：
- 报表生成
- 后台页面快速出UI
- AI生成结果可视化

现在很多 Agent 还停留在“能生成”，但展示层其实差一截

这个算是补了最后一公里

RT @icreatelife: This might be the most personal AI animation I've ever made. 

10 years. New York. Infinite memories. 
Turn your sound on…

Ask ChatGPT or another LLM with memory: 

Knowing everything you know about me, generate a bookshelf of the books you would recommend me to read

Here’s mine. I read most of them and have some on my to-read list, so it was a pretty accurate suggestion. 

What did you get? https://t.co/e89rhl5t5G
People make amazing stuff with AI. Every Thursday during our AI art share I am observing so much process. Been doing this for almost 4 years now and the progress is incredible

Got up to a lot of news about layoffs in tech industry. If you were affected, I am always happy to help with CV review, recommendations and a referral. Also I know a lot of people in AI industry and often get job opportunities I usually can’t take as already fully employed. 

DMs

Community building is impossible without engaging posts and engaging posts don't mean engagement farming.

How to spot the difference? 

A person who builds community actively visits feeds of people who commented on their posts, reposts their work, shares tutorials, offers
I'm so impressed by the talent of creative community here on X. Just look at this artist's paintings.
But seriously. How people are so talented.

RT @xicilion: 人的欲望是无限的。写了 20 年代码的人，脑子里面有无数因为体力约束不能实现的点子，ai 不但没有剥夺他们的乐趣，反而成为他们的鸦片。
比如我。😎

Big increases in message discipline across all the AI labs in recent weeks, an inevitable outcome of the labs being subject to increased scrutiny. 

Much more boring than the oracular mutterings or Discordian epigrams of the last couple years & maybe obscures their real thinking

There are some clear exceptions to the rule, but I feel like the labs got the message that they were scaring people and now tweet about happy stuff and random product trash talk rather than the coming of the Machine God.

I don't think what they believe has changed, though.

Working on this technique of storyboarding today and want to share this amazing AI creator who has been recently inspiring me a lot.

After Effects team! Hello!
(actually already passed it to the team)

This color coded storyboarding method from Koda is absolutely fantastic. 

What I did was taking his prompt and asking Claude to adept it to my use case (a woman chasing a tortoise in New York City) it gave me a great working prompt. 

I used GPT Image 2 in Adobe Firefly Boards https://t.co/UYvb7IjnWm
The path is clear
